case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SALVADOR M LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED MAY-04-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SALVADOR M

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SALVADOR M $959.20 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,044.20, ON DEFAULTED LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 6/28/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JHONATTAN HERRADA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $959.20 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SALVADOR M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.
